description: The annual corporate policy rollout is due. A rollout memo has been placed on the Desktop at ~/Desktop/policy_rollout_memo.txt containing the Titles and Descriptions for 3 new policies. The policy PDF files are located in ~/Documents/2026_Policies/. Upload all 3 policy PDFs to Sentrifugo's Policy Documents module, applying the exact Titles and Descriptions specified in the memo.

policies.title: 2026 HIPAA and Privacy Standards
policies.desc: Mandatory privacy and data security standards for all patient-facing and administrative staff.

policies.title: Hybrid and Remote Work Policy
policies.desc: Updated guidelines for telecommuting, core hours, and home office equipment reimbursement.

policies.title: Employee Code of Conduct (2026 Edition)
policies.desc: Annual update to the corporate code of conduct, anti-harassment, and ethics guidelines.
